title: junellia glauca
intro: Junellia glauca, also known as Lippia turbinata, is a flowering plant native to South America, belonging to the Verbenaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, derived from its essential oils. The health benefits of Junellia glauca include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues such as nausea and diarrhea. Herbal preparations of Junellia glauca may include tea infusions, essential oil extracts, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally, although it is recommended to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
